snps.effect_template: ORMDL3/GSDMB locus on 17q21. Most replicated childhood asthma risk locus.
ORMDL3 orosomucoid like 3. ER stress and ceramide biosynthesis in asthma.
IL33 interleukin 33. Th2 immune response and allergic inflammation.
TSLP thymic stromal lymphopoietin protective variant. Dendritic cell-mediated immunity.
IL13 interleukin 13. Th2 differentiation and airway remodeling in asthma.
SMAD3 SMAD family member 3. TGF-beta signaling in airway remodeling.
HLA-DQ MHC class II antigen. Allergen presentation to T cells.

recommendation_template: Avoid known triggers (allergens, pollution, smoke). Maintain healthy weight. Regular exercise improves lung function. Keep rescue inhaler available if diagnosed.

studies.title: A large-scale, consortium-based genomewide association study of asthma
studies.finding: ORMDL3 locus (17q21) strongly associated with childhood asthma (OR=1.4)

studies.title: Meta-analysis of genome-wide association studies identifies ten loci influencing allergic sensitization
studies.finding: Identified multiple asthma and allergy loci including IL33, TSLP, IL13, SMAD3, and HLA-DQ
